text.p: How are you and the life with you their in abroad? I hope the life there was fantastic compare to Nigeria. My dear, how I wish to see my self their one day to come and experiene the life in abroad. Infact, if I remember the life we spent together in Nigeria, and the one you me about the one in abroad I always felt disappointed. My dear, I always missed you. But I am the man sure you are doing fine and okey? If so let thanks be to Almighty God.

The main aim of writing this letter to you is to tell you about the last National population and housing census that took place in Nigeria. Actually the counti-ng was successefully conducted without any much problems.
On the first day they started, so many place or states did not start because there was shortage of working materials which were later provided. And it covers two weeks.

The counting was house by house and there are some questions that are expected to be answered by each an every persons in the family such as Names, Sex, Age, status, Number of children, the type of electronics in the house etc. And all these was done in both the villages and the cities in Nigeria. With this infor-mation Ni

With these Information and data colle-cted, the federal government of Nigeria were able to know the Number of unemployment, employed, educated, uneducated ie illitrate etc. it makes the federal government of Nigeria to know the total number of peoples in it country ie Nigeria, ie the programs gives the accurate and adequate Number of people in each villages, local, state and even in the federal. This is because , the counting Involved every body including the president of Nigeria and his family.

And the programs create job opp-ortunity to some people. Because the feder-al government employed many people there are supervisors, the lecturers that lecture the enumerators and the lecturers that lect-ure them on how to go about the programer how to enumerate people and the type of questions to ask be asked those people when they get how to number the houses after been enum-erated etc.

Finally, the National population and housing census that took place in Nigeria make the 2007 election to become turf and the terreble in Nigeria from the presidential - the Governors all the election was riging. Because the 2007 election result was confused and surprised due to the differences of votes.
Infact I cannot tell you much because of time factors untill you come back to Nigeria.
Regards to every body especially your well wishers.
